summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Marmitaria da Xai order popup system with multiple marmita sizes, beverages, desserts, and payment integration
passed_tests: Order popup opens from all 'Fazer Pedido' buttons (hero, menu, delivery sections)
Individual +/- quantity controls work for P/M/G marmita sizes
Multiple marmita sizes can be ordered simultaneously (tested 1P + 3M + 1G)
Correct marmita prices displayed and calculated (P R$18, M R$22, G R$28)
Beverages section with 6 options and correct prices (R$8, R$7, R$6, R$6, R$5, R$3)
Desserts section with 2 options: Tortinhas R$7 and Pudim R$6
Quantity controls work for beverages and desserts
Total calculation correctly includes marmitas + beverages + desserts (verified R$160 = 112+35+13)
Form validation prevents submission without marmitas (alert: 'pelo menos uma marmita')
WhatsApp integration opens correct URL (wa.me/5567982017678) with formatted message
Payment methods work: Pix, Dinheiro (shows change field), Cartão
Mobile responsive design - popup adapts correctly to mobile viewport
Day tabs locked for non-current days with informative modal
